title: OKLCH in CSS: Why We Moved from RGB and HSL — Evil Martians
insights: Definitive case for OKLCH migration. CSS Colors 4 spec uses OKLCH for gamut mapping. Perceptually uniform = equal numerical changes = equal perceived differences. Fixes blue/purple hue shifts in LCH. P3 gamut access. Token scale generation becomes formulaic

title: style-dictionary/style-dictionary GitHub — Amazon
insights: Main repo for Style Dictionary. Build system for creating cross-platform styles from design tokens. Most-starred design token transformation tool. Maintained by Amazon open source

title: Color — Material Design 3 (Material You)
insights: Dynamic color system. 5 key colors → 5 tonal palettes × 13 tones = 65 colors. Color roles: primary/secondary/tertiary each has 4 compatible tones (accent, on-color, container, on-container). Accessibility by default

title: Design Token-Based UI Architecture — Martin Fowler
insights: Published Dec 12 2024. Andreas Kutschmann. Tokens as first-class architectural artifact makes design system scalable. Organizing tokens in layers (options→decisions) ensures scalability. Deployment pipelines for automated cross-platform generation. Canonical architectural thinking

title: oklch() — MDN Web Docs
insights: Official MDN reference for oklch() CSS function. Cylindrical form of oklab(). L=lightness, C=chroma, H=hue + optional alpha. Full browser support as of 2024. W3C CSS Color Module Level 4

title: Naming Tokens in Design Systems — Nathan Curtis / EightShapes
insights: Canonical naming taxonomy reference. Levels: namespace-category-concept-property-variant/scale-state. Semantic tokens start with category. $esds-color-neutral-42 maps namespace+category+variant+scale. Foundational reading for all token teams

title: Tailwind CSS v4.0 — Official Blog
insights: CSS-first configuration via @theme directive. All theme tokens are CSS variables. HSL → OKLCH migration. Zero JavaScript config for theming. @theme defines design tokens consumed by utilities AND available as CSS variables at runtime

title: Theme Variables — Tailwind CSS v4 Docs
insights: @theme directive: define design tokens (colors, spacing, fonts, radii, shadows, animations, breakpoints). Tokens generate utilities AND browser CSS variables. Single CSS-first source of truth. --color-*, --spacing-*, --font-* naming convention

title: Design Tokens Resolver Module 2025.10
insights: Extends the format spec with multi-file theming. A set contains sources array with inline tokens or $ref pointers. Enables light/dark/brand modes without file duplication. Use .resolver.json extension

title: Design Tokens Color Module 2025.10
insights: Color module of DTCG spec. Full support for Display P3, OKLCH, and all CSS Color Module Level 4 spaces. Number of components depends on color space with optional alpha 0-1

title: Design Tokens Format Module 2025.10
insights: First stable W3C DTCG spec (2025.10). JSON format with $type/$value/$description. 13 token types from color/dimension to composite typography/shadow/gradient. Mandatory media type application/design-tokens+json. File extensions .tokens or .tokens.json

title: Radix Colors — Radix UI
insights: Gold standard for 12-step OKLCH color scales. Each accent has solid + transparent variants. Steps 1-2: backgrounds, 3-5: UI component backgrounds (normal/hover/active), 6-8: borders, 9-10: solid fills, 11-12: text (low/high contrast). APCA-based contrast targets

title: Design Tokens — Atlassian Design System
insights: Updated Oct 30 2024. Enables dark theme + improved accessibility. Tokens for: text, links, icons, backgrounds, borders, blankets, charts, skeleton loaders. Named by intent not color value. Light/dark/high-contrast modes supported

title: Atmos Style — OKLCH Color Palette Tool
insights: 30k+ designers use it. LCH/OKLCH-first UI palette builder. Builds accessible palettes with APCA (WCAG 3) and WCAG 2. Figma plugin. HEX/RGB/HSL/LCH/OKLCH converters. Export to design systems

title: Creating Themeable Design Systems — Brad Frost
insights: Token tier architecture secret sauce for multi-brand support. In April 2024 webinar: three-tier + legacy migration + light/dark modes. Practical implementation patterns

title: The Many Faces of Themeable Design Systems — Brad Frost
insights: Three-tier token architecture for theming. Tier 1: raw materials (abstract). Tier 2: semantic mappings. Tier 3: component-specific. Supports white-labeling, dark mode, multiple brands without component changes

title: Color Tokens — IBM Carbon Design System
insights: Role-based color token system. Themes specify values that serve roles. 4 themes: White, G10, G90, G100. New AI design token suite in 2024 for AI-specific components. Token files as JavaScript exports

title: Design Tokens — U.S. Web Design System (USWDS)
insights: Federal government design token system. Tokens as keys that unlock values through functions/mixins. Nov 2024: new model with USWDS Tokens 1.0 as Style Dictionary-based standalone package targeting Sass/CSS/mobile

title: Tokens Studio for Figma — Official Docs
insights: 264k Figma users. Supports 23+ token types. Multi-mode (light/dark/density), GitHub/GitLab sync, W3C DTCG v1 compliant. Free plugin + paid Studio platform. Bidirectional Figma→code workflow

title: Better Dynamic Themes in Tailwind with OKLCH Color Magic — Evil Martians
insights: Combines OKLCH + CSS custom properties + Tailwind for dynamic themes. Adjust only L and C to switch light/dark/high-contrast without re-authoring palettes. Practical implementation pattern

title: Exploring the OKLCH Ecosystem and Its Tools — Evil Martians
insights: May 2025 OKLCH ecosystem map: atmos.style, Harmony palette, Harmonizer, Polychrom, apcach. Browser support 92%+ in Q2 2025. Essential tool survey

title: Design Tokens — Fluent 2 Design System
insights: Fluent 2 token architecture. Two-layer: global (raw hex) + alias (semantic). Stored values used to assign Fluent styles: color, typography, spacing, elevation. DTCG format transition underway

title: Myndex/SAPC-APCA GitHub — APCA Algorithm
insights: APCA (Accessible Perceptual Contrast Algorithm) for WCAG 3. Replaces WCAG 2 luminance ratio with perceptually uniform scoring 0-100+. Context-aware: font size+weight affect score. Lc15=min non-text, Lc30=min text, Lc60=body text. Background-aware

title: Shopify/polaris-tokens GitHub
insights: npm @shopify/polaris-tokens. Full token architecture open-sourced. Typography, spacing, shadows, breakpoints, color. Good production reference for scale

title: carbon-design-system/carbon GitHub
insights: IBM Carbon main repo. 7k+ stars. Complete design system with token foundation. Working code + design tools + guidelines. Reference for enterprise token scale

title: chakra-ui/panda GitHub
insights: 7k+ stars. Type-safe CSS-in-JS framework for design systems. Design tokens as first-class concept. Zero runtime overhead, static CSS generation

title: DTCG GitHub Repository — design-tokens/community-group
insights: Official DTCG source repository on GitHub. All spec drafts, issues, PRs, and community discussion. Primary contribution point for the W3C community group

title: evilmartians/harmony GitHub
insights: OKLCH color palette using APCA contrast algorithm. CSS variables with RGB fallbacks. P3 gamut. Tailwind integration. MIT license. Previously unavailable P3 colors now accessible

title: material-foundation/material-color-utilities GitHub
insights: Google's official color utilities for Material You. Implements dynamic color algorithm, tonal palette generation, color scoring. Multi-platform: JS, Dart, Swift, Kotlin

title: primer/primitives GitHub
insights: Color, typography, spacing primitives as JSON. CSS variables + utility classes. Framework-agnostic: React, Rails. 9 themes (light, dark + high-contrast variants)

title: radix-ui/colors GitHub
insights: Source for all Radix color scales as CSS/JS/TS. OKLCH values with P3 gamut support. Used as primitive layer by many design systems

title: tokens-studio/figma-plugin GitHub
insights: Official open-source Figma plugin from Tokens Studio. JSON token management, GitHub sync, multi-mode themes, 264k+ users

title: tokens-studio/sd-transforms GitHub
insights: Custom transforms for Style Dictionary to handle Tokens Studio exports. Aligns Tokens Studio token types with DTCG. Handles fontStyles in fontWeights, excludes parent keys for single-file exports. v1.0.0 stable released Q2 2024

title: Guide to Variables in Figma — Figma Help
insights: Figma variables = design tokens in Figma. Support multiple modes (light/dark/density). Scoping for where variables apply. Code syntax for dev handoff. Export to JSON. 42.5% of teams adopted Figma variables as primary token source in 2024

title: Modes for Variables — Figma Help
insights: Each mode = different context (light/dark/compact/comfortable). One value per variable per mode. Export single mode or all modes as JSON. Core multi-mode token mechanism in Figma

title: Design Tokens — Material Design 3
insights: Three-tier token architecture: reference (raw) → system (semantic) → component. Token concept central to Material You. Replaces hardcoded hex values with self-explanatory names

title: Easing and Duration Token Specs — Material Design 3
insights: Official M3 motion token specifications. Easing curves and duration values as named tokens. Non-linear scale for perceived consistency across different animation distances

title: Creating a Flexible Design Token Taxonomy for Intuit's Design System — Nate Baldwin
insights: Intuit (QuickBooks, TurboTax, Mailchimp) flexible token taxonomy. Goal: intuitive + minimal set with broad use-case coverage. Tested with designers and developers from all consuming systems

title: Reimagining a Token Taxonomy — Nathan Curtis / EightShapes
insights: 18 months redesigning token taxonomies for 4 different design systems. Process: identify problems → define criteria → implement across design+code+docs. Minimal but robust token count

title: Tokens in Design Systems: 10 Tips — Nathan Curtis / EightShapes
insights: Original canonical tokens reference from 2016. Recommends JSON as open standard for encoding hierarchical name/value pairs. 10 architecture tips still broadly applicable

title: Tokens — Panda CSS Docs
insights: CSS-in-JS with atomic CSS at build time. Three token types: primitive (raw), semantic (contextual), component (scoped). Auto-generates CSS variables --colors-primary, --spacing-4. TypeScript strict mode. Semantic tokens as conditional values per context

title: Color Tokens — Shopify Polaris
insights: Complete v12 color token overhaul. Two token types: palette (private, used to create aliases) and alias (public for designers/devs). 12 core hues × 10-16 calibrated shades. Semantic --p-color-text replaces hex. Uniform contrast ratios across hues

title: UI Color System — Primer (GitHub)
insights: Three levels: base (raw), functional (global UI patterns: text/borders/shadows/backgrounds), component/pattern (specific). CSS variables + Figma variables. 9 themes including light, dark, high-contrast. Resolved 1000+ color-contrast accessibility issues

title: Design Tokens — Adobe Spectrum
insights: Adobe's design decisions as data. Tokens integrated into component libraries, UI kits, Spectrum XD plugin. Covers color, typography, spacing, platform scales, color themes, component states. Migrating from spectrum-vars to Core Tokens ecosystem

title: Design Tokens Community Group — Style Dictionary Docs
insights: Style Dictionary v4 native DTCG support. Documents how $type/$value/$description map to Style Dictionary internals. Essential bridge between spec and tooling

title: Design Tokens — Style Dictionary v4 Docs
insights: Style Dictionary v4 complete rewrite in ESM, browser-compatible. Removed CTI coupling — uses token.type property instead. Name transforms renamed: name/cti/kebab → name/kebab. Built-in transforms handle dimension, typography, border, shadow shorthand

title: Style Dictionary v4 Migration Guidelines
insights: v3→v4 breaking changes: CTI removed from transform names, ES Modules only, new DTCG $type/$value format native support, async transforms. Critical migration reference

title: Theming — shadcn/ui Docs
insights: --primary, --background, --foreground CSS variables as token system. tailwind.cssVariables=true enables CSS var mode. Tailwind v4 CLI support. HSL → OKLCH migration in progress. Three-layer variable structure: re-theme by changing semantic layer only

title: vanilla-extract — Zero-Runtime Stylesheets in TypeScript
insights: TypeScript design tokens with static CSS output. Type-safe theme contracts (createThemeContract). Multiple themes via CSS custom properties. Sprinkles API = type-safe Tailwind equivalent. Zero runtime

title: Design Tokens Glossary — DTCG
insights: Canonical definitions: token, type, composite token, token set, alias/reference. Type = predefined classification applied to token value. Composite token = token whose value has multiple named child values

title: Scales — Radix Colors Docs
insights: Deep dive into the 12-step color scale architecture. Step 9 has highest chroma (purest step). Each step has defined semantic purpose. Auto-generates accessible dark mode by adjusting L and C

title: Use Cases — Radix Colors Docs
insights: Complete use-case guide for each step. Step 3=normal states, 4=hover, 5=selected, 6=subtle borders, 7=interactive borders, 8=focus rings, 9=solid backgrounds, 11=low-contrast text, 12=high-contrast text

title: Color — Radix Themes Docs
insights: How Radix Themes maps color tokens to components. Accent/gray/overlay/surface color roles. CSS variables mapping

title: Best Practices For Naming Design Tokens, Components and Variables — Smashing Magazine
insights: Intuit case study by Nate Baldwin. Language brings logic to color. Levels: category/concept/property/variant/state. Large multi-platform systems use 5-6 levels. Interactive naming playbook by Romina Kavcic

title: State of Design Tokens 2024 Report — Supernova
insights: Survey of 200+ designers and developers. 84% adoption rate. 30+ page report. Token pipeline CI/CD trend dominant. 61% of teams use Style Dictionary or Tokens Studio as primary transformation pipeline

title: Design Tokens Specification Reaches First Stable Version
insights: Official announcement Oct 28 2025. 10+ tools implementing: Penpot, Figma, Sketch, Framer, Knapsack, Supernova, zeroheight. Reference implementations: Style Dictionary, Tokens Studio, Terrazzo. Orgs: Adobe, Amazon, Google, Baidu, Sony, Microsoft, Meta, Salesforce, Shopify, Figma, Disney, GM

title: Token Format — W3C DTCG vs Legacy — Tokens Studio Docs
insights: Documents difference between Tokens Studio legacy format and W3C DTCG $type/$value format. Migration path explained. Some token types differ subtly from DTCG — sd-transforms handles alignment

title: Remote Token Storage Integrations — Tokens Studio Docs
insights: Sync providers: GitHub, GitLab, Azure DevOps, Bitbucket, JSONBin, Supernova, generic URL. W3C-compliant JSON structures. Creates bidirectional design-code source of truth

title: adobe/spectrum-tokens GitHub (redirects to spectrum-design-data)
insights: Redirects to adobe/spectrum-design-data. Active development moved there. Beyond just tokens — comprehensive design data and tooling. npm: @adobe/spectrum-tokens

title: terrazzoapp/dtcg-examples GitHub
insights: Open-source design systems expressed as DTCG JSON examples. Valuable reference corpus for real-world DTCG token structure

title: terrazzoapp/terrazzo GitHub
insights: Open-source, MIT. Was formerly Cobalt UI 2.0 (same team). Generate CSS/Sass/JS/TS from DTCG tokens. CLI and Node.js API

title: Token Naming Reference — Fluent UI Token Pipeline
insights: Microsoft's comprehensive token naming reference. Global tokens = context-agnostic raw values. Alias tokens = semantic meaning. Two-layer Fluent token architecture

title: Open Props — CSS Variables as Design Tokens
insights: CSS-native token system. No deps, 21.3 kB. Colors, typography, spacing, borders, shadows, gradients, animations. CSS/PostCSS/JSON/JS formats. CDN or npm. 1M+ weekly npm downloads. Alternative to heavy UI frameworks

title: Terrazzo — Getting Started Docs
insights: MIT-licensed DTCG implementation. Takes DTCG JSON → CSS, Sass, JS/TS, JSON, Tailwind output. Listed as official DTCG reference implementation alongside Style Dictionary and Tokens Studio

title: DTCG Tokens — Terrazzo Docs
insights: Step-by-step guide for using W3C DTCG tokens with Terrazzo. Closest-to-spec implementation. Not its own format

title: Style Dictionary V4 Release Plans — Tokens Studio Blog
insights: v4 Q2 2024 release coordinated with sd-transforms v1.0.0 stable. Describes the integration strategy between Tokens Studio and Style Dictionary v4

title: Design Tokens Community Group FAQ
insights: Official answers to why JSON, relationship to CSS variables, how aliases work, tool integration FAQ. Good onboarding resource

title: Cobalt UI — CI for Design Tokens
insights: Predecessor to Terrazzo (renamed). DTCG-compatible tooling. CLI or Node.js usage. Plugins for CSS, Sass, JS/TS, Tailwind, Figma integration

title: OKLCH in CSS: Consistent, Accessible Color Palettes — LogRocket
insights: Practical OKLCH implementation guide. Consistent color scale generation using formula. Accessible token generation. Integration with design systems

title: Motion — IBM Carbon Design System
insights: Non-linear duration scale for perceived consistency across distances. Motion tokens categorized by expressiveness. IBM's production-proven motion token system

title: oklch() — CSS-Tricks Almanac
insights: Practical OKLCH reference with examples. Can be used anywhere CSS accepts color including color-mix(). Global support rate exceeded 92% in Q2 2025

title: What Are Design Tokens? — CSS-Tricks
insights: Canonical introductory reference. Platform-agnostic representation of design decisions. CSS variables as implementation layer. Foundational reading still widely cited

title: WCAG 3.0 Introduces New Contrast Method — Designsystemet
insights: Norwegian design system on WCAG 3 + APCA adoption. Color token system guarantees contrast regardless of brand color inputs. Practical guidance for government scale

title: Colors — Designsystemet (Norwegian Government)
insights: Norwegian public sector design system. Flexible token structure. Semantic color naming (success/danger/warning/info/neutral). Theme builder. Auto-contrast guarantee regardless of brand colors. V1 released 2024

title: Design Tokens Pills — Francesco Improta Substack
insights: Dedicated newsletter on design tokens. Topics: governance, motion tokens, link tokens, compound tokens, interactive state tokens, Figma variables. Consistent high-quality technical analysis

title: Decoding Compound Tokens — Francesco Improta
insights: DTCG composite tokens (typography, shadow, border, transition, gradient). When to use compound vs individual tokens. Serialization and usage patterns

title: Design Tokens Governance — Francesco Improta
insights: Token governance: naming standards, deprecation policies, versioning, ownership between design and engineering. Enterprise-critical topic rarely documented

title: Structuring Design Tokens for Interactive States — Francesco Improta
insights: Token structure for hover/focus/active/disabled/selected states. State tokens as modifiers on semantic tokens. Best-practice patterns for interactive UI tokens

title: Understanding W3C Design Token Types — Francesco Improta
insights: Detailed walkthrough of all 13 DTCG token types. Strategies for Figma, CSS, and Penpot implementation. W3C standard types: color, dimension, fontFamily, fontWeight, duration, cubicBezier, number, strokeStyle, border, shadow, transition, typography, gradient

title: Design Tokens Course — Brad Frost and Ian Frost
insights: Enterprise-proven three-tier token architecture in Figma + code. Brad and Ian Frost. Recommends Web Components for interoperable themeable core systems

title: Building a Design Token Ecosystem: Source of Truth to Automated Distribution
insights: CI/CD pipeline for tokens: JSON validator → Style Dictionary build → npm publish → semantic-release. Automated versioning via Conventional Commits. Production-ready token pipeline pattern

title: Design Tokens and Theming — Atlassian Developer
insights: Forge apps using Atlassian tokens mirror parent app theme. Non-color themes: density/motion/typography. Color token naming: property → role → emphasis → state. Contextual tokens for layering model

title: prefers-contrast — MDN Web Docs
insights: Media query for detecting user contrast preference. Values: no-preference, more, less, forced. Token systems must define high-contrast mode token set responding to this query

title: apcach — Evil Martians APCA Tool
insights: APCA-based contrast checker and color adjustment tool for accessible color token generation. Part of Evil Martians OKLCH ecosystem

title: Design Tokens: The Foundation of Your UI Architecture — Feature-Sliced Design
insights: Tokens as first-class architectural artifact makes design system scalable not fragile. Architectural thinking beyond just tooling. Feb 2026

title: Myndex/apca-w3 GitHub — W3C APCA Version
insights: APCA version licensed for W3C/AGWG use. The algorithm that will underpin WCAG 3.0 color contrast. Essential for accessible token color generation

title: material-foundation/material-theme-builder GitHub
insights: Official Material theme builder tool. Visualize dynamic color, create custom Material themes from seed color. Reference implementation for M3 token system

title: sturobson/Awesome-Design-Tokens GitHub
insights: Curated list: tools, articles, implementations, conferences. Community-maintained. Primary discovery resource for the entire token ecosystem

title: uswds/uswds GitHub
insights: Official USWDS repo. 6k+ stars. Production token system for US federal websites. Accessibility + mobile-first focus

title: Inside Design Tokens: The Three Class Token Society — Thomas Gossmann
insights: Option tokens (primitives/globals) → decision tokens (aliases/semantic) → component tokens. Three-tier analysis with pros/cons. Component layer increases maintenance but improves DX. Token count vs developer experience trade-off

title: Harmonizer — Evil Martians
insights: Web app + Figma plugin for generating accessible OKLCH palettes. Uses APCA. Consistent chroma across all hues and levels. Export to CSS variables

title: Variables in Dev Mode — Figma Help
insights: Developer inspection of design tokens in Figma. Click variable name in Inspect panel → Variable details modal. CSS code snippets with token names. Dev Mode as design-dev handoff layer

title: Multi-Branded Design System with Tokens — Hike One (Signify/Philips)
insights: Real enterprise multi-brand case study. Philips Hue + Signify brands sharing component library. Single JSON file (~60 tokens) per brand. Adding 5th brand took 2 hours with zero component changes

title: Synchronizing Figma Variables with Design Tokens — Nate Baldwin
insights: Intuit lead Nate Baldwin on bidirectional Figma Variables ↔ design tokens sync. Workflow patterns, code examples. Critical for design-dev alignment at enterprise scale

title: Animation/Motion Design Tokens for Complex Design Systems — Oscar Gonzalez
insights: Motion token anatomy: trigger, duration, easing, property. Encapsulating easing+duration into intent-named tokens. Choreography vs individual animation tokens. Scalable motion system design

title: Design Tokens Beyond Colors, Typography and Spacing — Bumble Tech
insights: Extending tokens to: motion, z-index, border-radius, opacity, grid. Tokens for every design decision not just the obvious ones. Broad token taxonomy from production system

title: Design Tokens — Nord Design System (Nordhealth)
insights: CSS custom properties as primary consumption method. Raw values automatically transformed to Sass/CSS/JSON. Active changelog with Jun 2024 and Apr 2024 updates. @nordhealth/tokens npm

title: Spectrum Token Visualization Tool
insights: Interactive visualization of all Spectrum tokens. See values, references, usage across modes. Valuable for understanding token structure at scale

title: Design Tokens for Designers — Penpot Blog
insights: Penpot is first design tool with native W3C DTCG standard support. Practical guide for designers. Covers JSON structure, token types, aliases

title: Developer's Guide to Design Tokens and CSS Variables — Penpot
insights: Cross-platform benefits + CSS variables dynamic flexibility. CSS Variables drive runtime theming, tokens drive design system definition. Updated Jan 2026

title: Palettes and Roles — Shopify Polaris
insights: Palette tokens (private) vs alias tokens (public API). Color roles by intent not value name. Architecture decision rationale documented

title: Design Tokens Format Module — Second Editors Draft
insights: Second editors draft — pre-stable version of the DTCG format spec. Useful for understanding evolution from draft to 2025.10 stable

title: Design Tokens — Serendie Design System (Mitsubishi Electric)
insights: Mitsubishi Electric public release Nov 7 2024. Two-tier: reference tokens (raw) → system tokens (alias). JSON as Single Source of Truth. Auto-synced to Figma Variables. CC BY 4.0 licensed

title: sturobson/Awesome-Design-Tokens GitHub
insights: Curated list of all design token resources: tools, articles, implementations. Community-maintained. Primary discovery resource for the ecosystem

title: Tailwind v4 — shadcn/ui Docs
insights: shadcn/ui updated for Tailwind v4 @theme directive. All components updated. HSL colors converted to OKLCH. @theme inline option support

title: Mastering Typography with Semantic Tokens and Responsive Scaling — UX Collective
insights: Fluid typography using semantic tokens + CSS clamp. Token-driven responsive scaling without breakpoints. Font-size, line-height, letter-spacing token structure at scale

title: Tokens Studio for Figma — Figma Community Plugin
insights: 264k+ users. Most popular design tokens plugin for Figma. W3C DTCG compliant, multi-mode, GitHub sync

title: The Essential Principles of Scalable Token Architecture — Supernova
insights: Scalable token architecture principles from Supernova. Naming conventions, deprecation strategies, tier separation, documentation requirements for enterprise-scale systems

title: Design Token Management — Supernova
insights: Figma → Supernova detects change → converts to CSS/Swift/Kotlin → PR in repo. Token pipeline automation. Separate token/component/asset overviews. Token blocks with health tracking

title: What's New in the Design Tokens Spec — zeroheight Blog
insights: Covers theming, modern color spaces (OKLCH, P3), multi-file resolver, group/alias improvements. Zeroheight tokens manager is W3C DTCG spec compliant

title: Design Token Management Tools 2025: Complete Guide to 15 Best Solutions
insights: Comprehensive comparison of 15 tools: Tokens Studio, Style Dictionary, Supernova, Specify, Zeroheight, Knapsack, Backlight, and more. Pricing, features, use cases

title: Design Tokens — California Design System (CA.gov)
insights: Government design system token implementation. Accessible, accessible, accessible. Public sector token use case with mandated compliance requirements

title: Design Tokens and Variables — Francesco Improta
insights: Clarifies conceptual difference: tokens = design decisions as data, CSS variables = runtime implementation. Not the same thing but closely related

title: Motion Tokens: Naming Your Movement — Francesco Improta
insights: Naming patterns for easing and duration tokens. Semantic motion token names that convey intent. Bridges motion design and token architecture

title: One Token, One Value — Francesco Improta
insights: Design principle: each token = exactly one value. Against multi-value tokens. Clarity, predictability, debuggability. Token architecture principle

title: Design Tokens Specification Reaches First Stable Version — DesignZig
insights: Community summary of the 2025.10 DTCG stable release. Lists all implementing organizations and tools. Good for breadth scan

title: Managing Design Tokens Using Storybook — DEV Community
insights: Storybook Design Token addon parses CSS/SASS to generate token docs. Token PR + Chromatic visual regression = controlled loop. Storybook 8.5+ automated visual testing

title: Exploring Typesafe Design Tokens in Tailwind 4 — DEV Community
insights: TypeScript-safe token patterns with Tailwind v4 @theme. Token-only styling (no raw Tailwind literals). Type inference from CSS variables

title: SLDS Design Tokens — Salesforce LWC Developer Guide
insights: SLDS 2 replaces design tokens with global styling hooks (CSS custom vars). SLDS 2 separates structure from visual design. Styling hooks = deeper customization/theming

title: TokiForge/tokiforge GitHub
insights: Runtime theme switching for React/Vue/Svelte/Angular. CSS custom properties. <3KB, type-safe, framework-agnostic. Modern alternative to heavy theming solutions

title: postcss-design-tokens — csstools/postcss-plugins GitHub
insights: @design-tokens at-rule to import design tokens in CSS. @csstools/postcss-design-tokens. Style Dictionary format support. Declarative token usage in CSS source files

title: klaufel/awesome-design-systems GitHub
insights: Curated list including design token tools: Style Dictionary, Figmagic, Token Validator, token resources. Broader design system context

title: nclsndr/design-tokens-format-module GitHub
insights: TypeScript implementation of the DTCG Format Module specification. Useful for type-safe token parsing in JS/TS toolchains

title: salesforce-ux/theo GitHub — Original Design Token Tool
insights: Original design token tool from Salesforce (2015). Coined design tokens as a concept. Last major update 2016 but historically critical. JSON/YAML input → Sass/Less/Stylus/XML/JSON output. Preceded Style Dictionary

title: serendie/design-token GitHub
insights: Open-source Mitsubishi Electric design tokens. JSON master files auto-synced to Figma Variables. React components + TypeScript

title: telekom/design-tokens GitHub — Deutsche Telekom
insights: Source of truth for Telekom-branded digital products. Open-source under MPL 2.0 with neutral theme option. Brand assets (magenta, typeface) require separate permission

title: Design Tokens — Penpot Help
insights: Penpot UI for managing DTCG tokens natively. Export/import workflow. First tool with full DTCG spec compliance

title: Hopper Design System — Workleap
insights: React component library with OKLCH-friendly semantic tokens. Core + semantic token layers. Styled System-inspired API. TypeScript-based type-safe props. Sentiment-based color assignment

title: Core Motion Tokens — Hopper Design System
insights: Production motion token examples: duration, easing. Shows how core→semantic aliasing works for animation tokens

title: Semantic Color Tokens — Hopper Design System
insights: Core color tokens (raw) → semantic color tokens (intent). Sentiment-based color roles. Space tokens: inset (padding) + stack (margins) naming convention

title: Responsive Tokens — Universal Design Systems
insights: Tokens that change based on viewport context. CSS clamp-based fluid spacing tokens. Universal design system architecture supporting responsive token values

title: Design Tokens Architecture in Tetrisly: Part 2 Taxonomy
insights: Real production taxonomy design from Tetrisly system. Detailed naming conventions, tier implementation, Figma variable mapping

title: Token JSON Format Reference — Fluent UI Token Pipeline
insights: JSON format used by Fluent UI token pipeline (now transitioning to DTCG standard). Token file structure, sets, references. Deprecated in favor of standard DTCG

title: Design Tokens Changelog — Nord Design System
insights: Active 2024 changelog. New sizing tokens added. Track evolution of production token systems

title: Design Tokens — Mozilla Protocol Design System
insights: Mozilla's production design token system. Color, typography, spacing tokens for Firefox product family. Cross-platform token implementation at scale

title: Motion — Seeds Design System (Sprout Social)
insights: Production motion token system. Fast/normal/slow duration tokens. Semantic easing curve names. Real-world motion token implementation from SaaS product

title: Specify — Design Token Engine
insights: Token management platform. Collaborative designer sync + developer integration. Part of growing token platform ecosystem alongside Supernova, Zeroheight

title: The Pyramid Design Token Structure — Stefanie Fluin
insights: Pyramid metaphor for token hierarchy. Bottom=global/primitive, middle=alias/semantic, top=component. Visual mnemonic for the standard three-tier architecture

title: Theme Tokens — Stitches Docs
insights: Tokens auto-map to most appropriate CSS scale. CSS variables under-the-hood. Smooth developer experience for token consumption. Scale-aware design system

title: Storybook Design Token Addon
